Quick Access
CUSA INSIDER · PODCAST GRAPHICS
← HUB
SPORTS GRAPHICS SYSTEM

MATCHUP & FINAL SCORE GRAPHICS

Matchup and final-score artboards for football, basketball, soccer, volleyball, baseball, and softball — three layouts each (full-screen, lower-third, left-slab). Every element animates independently for clean After Effects compositing. Use the floating Graphics Controls panel to switch sport, layout, accent, and edit team data.

16:9 · 1920×1080 3 layouts × 6 sports × 2 graphic types Click any artboard to focus · Drag to reorder
